metadata.description: Curated AI agent skills for software development — game dev, pixel art, image generation, and more.

plugins.name: phaser-gamedev
plugins.description: Build 2D browser games with Phaser 3 — scenes, sprites, Arcade/Matter physics, tilemaps, animations, keyboard input.

plugins.name: image-generation
plugins.description: Generate game assets via Google Gemini API and process them into final sprite files.

plugins.name: pixellab
plugins.description: Generate pixel art assets using PixelLab MCP — Wang tilesets, characters, map objects.
